description: You are a craft artist who sells handmade clothing through your WooCommerce store. Your product catalog has grown and you need to organize it with a proper category hierarchy for better customer navigation. In the WooCommerce admin (http://localhost/wp-admin/, credentials: admin / Admin1234!), create a top-level category named 'Apparel' (slug: apparel, description: 'Clothing and fashion items'). Create two child categories under 'Apparel': 'Tops' (slug: tops, description: 'T-shirts, sweaters, and upper body wear') and 'Bottoms' (slug: bottoms, description: 'Jeans, pants, and lower body wear'). Assign the products 'Organic Cotton T-Shirt' and 'Merino Wool Sweater' to the 'Tops' category, and assign the 'Slim Fit Denim Jeans' to the 'Bottoms' category.

descriptions.Tops: T-shirts, sweaters, and upper body wear
descriptions.Bottoms: Jeans, pants, and lower body wear
